roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
DEFT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC1538,5 - FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/CTORD:THIS SENTENCE SHALL RUN CONCURRENT WITH THE SENTENCE IN #20010087/TWS/CH2:CJ 2 D/CTS: 2/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/4019HALF/DISM3/EMTERM/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANORVICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:01-12-21/CTORD:THIS VICTIM RESTITUTION REPORT SHALL BE PREPARED ALONG WITH THE REPORT IN CASE #20010087 & ANY RESTITUTION OWED IN THIS MATTER IS HARVEY WAIVEDINTO THAT GRANT OF PROBATION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 11-04-20/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MTS/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV RTS:2/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
